title: rubus × montaniformis
intro: Rubus × montaniformis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a complex hybrid species of the genus Rubus, resulting from the crossing of the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, a potent antioxidant that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Rubus × montaniformis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Rubus × montaniformis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
